name: So Cal Loans
description_short: So Cal Loans offers residential mortgages, commercial real estate financing, and business lending solutions across Southern California with personalized guidance from experienced professionals.
description_long:
So Cal Loans is a lending brokerage operating in Southern California that positions itself as a comprehensive financial solutions provider. The company is led by CEO Reyes Mejia, who brings over two decades of lending sector experience, and Head of Business Lending Wilber Cabrera with 14+ years in business financing. The firm emphasizes personalized service and expert guidance throughout the lending process.

So Cal Loans offers three primary service categories: residential real estate financing for homebuyers in the competitive Southern California market, commercial real estate solutions leveraging market knowledge and a network of lenders, and business lending for expansion, launches, and cash flow management across diverse industries. The company also mentions financing options for construction and rehab projects. They position themselves as a loan concierge service that matches clients with appropriate lenders rather than directly originating loans.

The company distinguishes itself through claims of personalized service, a dedicated loan concierge model, competitive rates and low fees sourced from their lender network, and experienced leadership. Their marketing emphasizes flexibility and adaptability of lending solutions tailored to individual client needs. They offer appointment-based consultations with lending specialists and maintain business hours Monday-Friday, 9AM-5PM.

While the website presents professional credentials and lending experience, the company operates as a broker/intermediary rather than a direct lender. The vague placeholder text scattered throughout the site ('Cras placerat integer mollis si vitae phasellus hac platea tempor' and similar Latin filler) raises questions about website professionalism and completeness. Substantive information about specific loan terms, rates, approval timelines, or minimum/maximum loan amounts is absent from their public-facing content.
address: 3864 City Terrace Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90063

company_info.headquarters: 3864 City Terrace Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90063

pros: Leadership with significant industry experience (CEO 20+ years, Head of Business Lending 14+ years in lending)
Offers three distinct lending categories under one firm: residential mortgages, commercial real estate, and business loans
Positions loan concierge model to match clients with appropriate lenders from their network
Claims competitive rates and low fees across their lender network partnerships
Emphasizes personalized, tailored loan solutions rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Covers specialized lending including construction and rehab project financing
Multiple contact channels: phone (1-877-317-1207), email (info@socal.loans), and appointment scheduling available
cons: Website contains unprofessional placeholder text (Latin filler), suggesting incomplete or poorly maintained web presence
No specific information on loan terms, interest rates, fees, or approval timelines publicly available
Operates as a broker/intermediary rather than direct lender, adding potential middleman layers
Minimal detail on lending requirements, credit score thresholds, or qualification criteria
No third-party reviews, ratings, or complaints information visible; testimonials section incomplete ('Our clients trust' cuts off)
best_for: Southern California homebuyers seeking personalized mortgage guidance through the competitive regional market
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing flexible commercial financing for expansion or operations
Commercial real estate investors evaluating property purchases with professional market guidance
diagnosis: So Cal Loans is best suited for Southern California-based borrowers (homebuyers, business owners, real estate investors) seeking personalized mortgage and commercial lending guidance from experienced professionals. Primary caveat: the company operates as a broker intermediary rather than direct lender, and the website lacks concrete information on rates, terms, and specific loan products—making it difficult to assess actual offerings or competitiveness without direct contact.
services: Residential mortgage lending for home purchases
Business lending for expansion and growth
Loan concierge service matching clients with lenders
Multi-industry business lending (claims to serve diverse industries)
